violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an black biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The wall in the mop sink area is in poor repair, inspector observed missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Establishment is using time as a public health control for deli ham. Establishment does not have approval to use time as a public health control for deli ham. Ham was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the storage racks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
The 3-bay sink plumbing (faucet and pipe under the sink) is in poor repair. Leak observed. A plumbing system must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility, especially under equipment, 3-bay sink, and behind storage shelves, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment must clean facility. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The following items were in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. 1) Walk-cooler floor plate is missing hardware and detached. 2) Tile in the mop sink area, near the floor drain of the 3-bay sink, and the wall near the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
Beverage cooler located in the front end kitchen area was not in good repair(observed water pooling inside and outside of the equipment). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves and equipment in the kitchen in have an accumulation of food residue, grease, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2023

The following physical facilities have an accumulation of debris: 1.floors throughout facility have an accumulation of soil residue and grease. 2.ceiling vents observed with dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2023
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service until washed and sanitized.PIC voluntary disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

Various food product was observed held at (43-47) degrees Fahrenheit in walk in cooler and 66 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

Establishment was using time as a public health control for ham. Per RIDOH CFP, ham is not an approved food item under establishment's variance acceptance letter. PIC instructed to no longer keep ham out of temperature control and to adhere only to the approved variance letter. PIC voluntarily disposed of ham. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

Condensation observed dripping on food product in walk in cooler. Food product was kept in boxes. No adulteration was observed. PIC informed to remove product from that area. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was (100) parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for (quat) sanitizer is (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

The: 1.walk in cooler located in the back kitchen (ambient temperature 46 degrees F) 2.ice machine(metal inside was warped) 3.lights shield(warped) was not in good repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves in throughout establishment milk refrigerator, hot holding equipment, gaskets in the walk in cooler, 1 dr milk refrigerators, and shelves in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility, floors and walls in walk in cooler and freezer, and ceilings and ceiling vents in kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris. and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
1.walls in the drive thru drink station area is in poor repair (hole in wall). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
